title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS backed by $85M+ in funding and trusted by brands like The New York Times, Wiz, and Lyft, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale its GTM engine. Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role requires 7+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce expertise, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Involves collaboration with the Tel Aviv HQ across time zones.
score_reason: Perfect alignment on seniority (15+ vs 7+ required), B2B SaaS fintech expertise, Salesforce mastery, and scaling experience. Tel Aviv HQ collaboration with NYC base matches his geographic flexibility and eliminates relocation friction.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of RevOps opening and immediately thought of you—your 15+ years scaling GTM engines in B2B SaaS fintech aligns almost perfectly with their mandate to build a revenue machine for a $85M+ funded company. With your deep Salesforce expertise and track record scaling past $30M ARR, plus your willingness to work across Tel Aviv HQ collaboration, you'd hit the ground running reporting to their CRO.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
location: Hybrid (in-office 2x per week at hub location)
description: Gong, a leader in revenue intelligence, seeks a RevOps Manager focused on Territory Strategy & Operations to accelerate revenue growth and seller productivity through data-driven territory design. Requires 3-5+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Strategy, or GTM planning; deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models, sales territories, and segmentation; strong analytical skills in Excel, SQL, and BI tools (Tableau, Retool); and proficiency with Salesforce and territory management tools like Fullcast, Pigment, or Anaplan.
score_reason: Exceptional match—Omri's 15+ years B2B SaaS RevOps expertise, Salesforce proficiency, and GTM strategy background directly align with Gong's territory strategy and pipeline acceleration needs. The role leverages his core strengths in data-driven sales operations and analytical rigor.
ai_opener: Omri here—impressed by Gong's territory intelligence approach. With 15+ years scaling B2B SaaS GTM operations and deep Salesforce/territory management expertise, I've built data-driven segmentation and forecasting models that directly align with your RevOps mandate. Would love to explore how I can help accelerate seller productivity and revenue predictability at scale.

title: Revenue Operations Manager
description: VulnCheck, a fast-growing cybersecurity company, seeks a Revenue Operations Manager to support the operational engine powering its GTM teams. The role sits at the intersection of Sales, Marketing, Customer Success, and Finance. Requires 4+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops/GTM Systems within B2B SaaS, hands-on Salesforce administration, and experience managing a GTM tech stack (HubSpot, Salesforce, Outreach, Clay, QuotaPath). Owns CRM integrity, builds reporting infrastructure for pipeline health and forecasting, and generates actionable leadership insights.
score_reason: Excellent match across all dimensions: 15+ years B2B SaaS experience far exceeds 4+ year requirement, direct Salesforce admin expertise, proven GTM tech stack management (HubSpot, Salesforce), and core competencies in pipeline forecasting and CRM integrity align perfectly with role requirements.
ai_opener: I noticed VulnCheck is building out RevOps to scale your GTM engine—this is exactly where I've spent the last 15 years in B2B SaaS. I've owned the full GTM stack (Salesforce, HubSpot, forecasting infrastructure) at multiple growth-stage companies, and I'm particularly drawn to how you're structuring cross-functional accountability across Sales, Marketing, and CS. I'd be interested in exploring how I can help VulnCheck accelerate pipeline health and forecasting accuracy as you scale.

title: GTM Engineer

title: GTM Engineer

title: Head of Growth Marketing
description: Flex seeks a Head of Growth Marketing with 6-10+ years of experience in growth, digital, or performance marketing, ideally in FinTech or B2B SaaS. Requires 3+ years of people management with a track record of building high-performing teams, proven success scaling organizations from $50M to $200M+ ARR, demonstrated ability to scale self-serve acquisition/activation/monetization, deep expertise in SEO, paid acquisition, and demand generation, plus fluency in sales-led acquisition, intent-based targeting, and predictive analytics.
score_reason: Strong GTM/SaaS/FinTech alignment and scale experience match Omri's profile, but this is a pure growth marketing role emphasizing SEO/paid acquisition/demand gen—areas where his RevOps/pipeline forecasting expertise doesn't directly apply. Better suited for GTM leadership roles that span revenue operations and strategy rather than marketing-specific execution.
ai_opener: Omri here—saw Flex is scaling aggressively in FinTech and building out growth leadership. description: WalkMe seeks a Senior Director of Marketing Operations to lead and optimize its AI-first Marketing Operations function.
